classification_notes.reclassification_note: marin_building_permit_submittal_checklist_special_inspection_trigger reclassified from source_reference_only to trigger_only per BayArea Next Pass Binder 2026-03-21: requirement_type = trigger, document is the county permit submittal checklist not a fillable cover pack.

blocker_items: No Marin County-issued special inspection cover form (statement) is present — hard blocker for unincorporated Marin County projects; county form must be acquired before the cover_form slot can proceed
No Marin County recognized agencies list is present — agency selector cannot be validated; field remains free-text until list is acquired
City vs county routing is unresolved — no jurisdiction boundary resolver in place; routing requires GIS or address-based city membership lookup
Special inspection forms for Marin incorporated cities other than San Rafael are absent from the source set
San Rafael form is source_reference_only (URL verified-direct) — needs local mirror for offline support
